instruction: Three things wrong with the bluetooth icon: the base outline is blue, the red X mark is green (wrong color), AND the red X mark has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bluetooth.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #3b82f6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="6.5 6.5 17.5 17.5 12 23 12 1 17.5 6.5 6.5 17.5"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="92,16 104,28 98,22 104,16 92,28" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bluetooth.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="6.5 6.5 17.5 17.5 12 23 12 1 17.5 6.5 6.5 17.5"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,16 112,28 106,22 112,16 100,28" />
</svg>
